description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern design with a striped wood and black finish, giving it a contemporary look suitable for urban environments. The front side displays three drawers, each equipped with a sleek, curved metal handle for easy access. The top surface is flat and sturdy, ideal for placing office supplies or small equipment. The cabinet is supported by four small wheels, allowing for easy mobility across various surfaces. The sides and back are mostly solid black, with the striped wood pattern continuing on the top. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood and metal, providing both durability and style.
description: A modern, striped wood and black filing cabinet with three drawers, metal handles, and wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with curved metal handles and a striped wood-black finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid black panel with the striped wood pattern visible only on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the drawers and the striped wood pattern on top, with no handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid black panel and visible wheels.
